title: $33 Million Awarded for Mobility Projects Including EV Carsharing, E-Bike Sharing, and Electric School Buses
content: Californiaâ€™s Clean Mobility Options Voucher Program (CMO) has awarded $33 million to support clean transportation projects in under-resourced communities, bringing its total investment to over $66 million. The funds support initiatives like electric carsharing, bike-sharing, and clean transit options to reduce air pollution and improve mobility access. This round includes $12.5 million for general recipients, $3 million for tribal governments, and $10 million for Mobility Project Vouchers. CARB also recently awarded $42 million to related transportation equity programs, reinforcing Californiaâ€™s commitment to sustainable, community-driven mobility solutions.
author: Analysts Account
